QueryVpcList.marker: The starting position for paginated list queries, a system-generated string
QueryVpcList.maxKeys: Maximum number of items per page, typically not exceeding 1000, default value is 1000
QueryVpcList.isDefault: Whether it is the default VPC; valid values: true, false; if not specified, all VPCs are returned
QueryVpcList.vpcIds: Specifies the VPCs to query; multiple vpcIds are separated by commas
